title: InstrumentEligibilityRequest
description: Request payload for checking instrument eligibility. At least one of `instrumentIds` or `symbols` must be provided; combined length must not exceed 100 instruments.

instrumentIds.description: Optional list of instrument IDs to check.

symbols.description: Optional list of instrument symbols to check.

currency.description: Requested currency for financial amounts in the eligibility response (e.g. minimum position size). Currently only USD is supported.
